title: Verify clicking the homepage widget/pill navigates to the Trial Corner hub
description: Test that tapping the entry point (widget or pill) successfully redirects the user to the dedicated Trial Corner screen.
preconditions: The Trial Corner widget or pill is visible

steps.description: 1. Locate the 'Trial Mode' widget or floating pill

expected_result: The user is navigated to the 'Trial Corner' screen/dashboard.
